ogTitle: Pyap vs Pyap West: Climate Safety

heading: Pyap vs Pyap West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pyap, South Australia and Pyap West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pyap has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pyap West (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pyap or Pyap West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pyap has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Pyap West scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pyap scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Pyap West scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pyap or Pyap West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pyap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
